description: Tests that triage applies one category + one state role, reproduces bugs, and uses the AI disclaimer on posts

tests.prompt: En ny bugg kom in: kartan laddar inte. Triagea den.
tests.expected_output_description: Gather context, attempt repro, recommend category + state role, post with disclaimer

assertions.check: Output attempts or mentions reproducing the bug before deciding
Output assigns a category role (bug or enhancement)
Output assigns a state role (needs-triage, needs-info, ready-for-agent, ready-for-human, or wontfix)
Output mentions that any posted comment must start with the AI-generated disclaimer
Output mentions exploring the codebase to build context for the issue

tests.prompt: En issue är fullständigt specad och redo för en AFK-agent. Vilken label?

assertions.check: Output recommends the ready-for-agent state role
Output mentions posting an agent brief for the issue
